deploy.startCommand: /bin/sh -c 'if [ "$BUMBLEBEE_RAILWAY_ROLE" = "api" ]; then exec python -m bumblebee.main api --host 0.0.0.0 --port "${PORT:-8080}"; elif [ "$BUMBLEBEE_RAILWAY_ROLE" = "onboard" ]; then exec python -m onboarding; elif [ -n "$BUMBLEBEE_ENTITY" ]; then exec python -m bumblebee.main worker "$BUMBLEBEE_ENTITY"; else echo "Railway: set BUMBLEBEE_RAILWAY_ROLE=onboard on the public onboarding service (and BUMBLEBEE_ONBOARD_TOKEN), or set BUMBLEBEE_ENTITY for the worker." >&2; exit 1; fi'
